title: Bob Spit: We Do Not Like People
original_title: Bob Cuspe: Nós Não Gostamos de Gente
overview: Bob Spit, a comic book character, lives in a post-apocalyptic desert inside the mind of his creator, the legendary Brazilian cartoonist Angeli. When Angeli decides to kill off Bob, the old punk leaves this wasteland and faces his creator.
